device_class_mapping.title: Sensor device class mapping
device_class_mapping.description: Assign device classes to ambiguous sensors. Sensors with unambiguous units (°C, ppm, etc.) are auto-detected.

abort.no_coordinator: Miniserver not connected. Please reload the integration first.
abort.no_mappable_sensors: No sensors with ambiguous device classes found.

data.generate_scenes_delay: Delay for the scene generation if enabled

device_class_mapping.title: Sensor device class mapping
device_class_mapping.description: Assign device classes to ambiguous sensors. Sensors with unambiguous units (°C, ppm, etc.) are auto-detected and not shown here.

reload.name: Pyloxone Reload
reload.description: Reloads the Loxone integration by reconnecting to the Miniserver and refreshing all entities. This is useful after making configuration changes in Loxone Config or when connection issues occur. All current entity states will be re\-synchronized from the Miniserver.

event_websocket_command.name: Send Websocket command
event_websocket_command.description: Send websocket commands to the loxone server. You can send a command to the Miniserver using an entity or using a UUID. If you specify both, the command will be sent to the Entity. More info and commands can be found on the Loxone Website

uuid.name: UUID
uuid.description: Uuid for entity which you want to send a command.

device.name: Entity
device.description: Device which you want to send a command

value.name: Command
value.description: Command which you want to send

event_secured_websocket_command.name: Send secured websocket command
event_secured_websocket_command.description: Send websocket commands to the loxone server. You can send a command to the Miniserver using an entity or using a UUID. If you specify both, the command will be sent to the Entity. More info and commands can be found on the Loxone Website

uuid.name: UUID
uuid.description: Uuid for entity which you want to send a command.

device.name: Entity
device.description: Device which you want to send a command

value.name: Command
value.description: Command which you want to send

sync_areas.name: Sync areas
sync_areas.description: Applies areas to the loxone entites based on the room from loxone. If area not exists entites will not be changed

create_areas.name: Create areas
create_areas.description: Force to create areas when they not exist in HA

enable_sun_automation.name: Enable sun automation
enable_sun_automation.description: Enable Sun automation for Loxone Jalousie

disable_sun_automation.name: Disable sun automation
disable_sun_automation.description: Disable Sun automation for Loxone Jalousie

quick_shade.name: Quick shade
quick_shade.description: Move Loxone Jalousie to shade position. Position is set by Loxone depends on multiple values.
